title: uechtritzia lacei
intro: Uechtritzia lacei, also known as Lace flower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Uechtritzia lacei include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Uechtritzia lacei include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to aid in relaxation, improve sleep, and support immune system function.
